name: set_speed
description: Set the TTS (text-to-speech) playback speed on the Voice PE device. The speed controls how fast the assistant speaks. Valid range is 0.7 (slower) to 1.2 (faster), with a default of 1.0 (normal speed). Returns the full updated settings object.

speed.description: The TTS playback speed. Valid range is 0.7 to 1.2. Default is 1.0.
